name: domain-crawl follows unquoted href attributes in minified real-world HTML so module pages behind a bare index still contribute rules
command:
OUT=/tmp/cl564-r49-$$; mkdir -p $OUT/docs $OUT/out && printf '

API

Index

The module index links every documented module below.

  • fs
  • http
' > $OUT/docs/index.html && printf '

fs

Close file descriptors deterministically

Programs must close every descriptor they open to avoid exhaustion.

' > $OUT/docs/fs.html && printf '

http

Set request timeouts explicitly

Servers must configure explicit socket timeouts for inbound requests.

' > $OUT/docs/http.html && cat > $OUT/reg.yaml <e.err; T=$OUT/out/node/r49-src.yaml; grep -q 'pages_fetched=3' e.err && grep -q 'close-file-descriptors-deterministically' $T && grep -q 'set-request-timeouts-explicitly' $T && echo unquoted-hrefs-followed 1>&2; rm -rf $OUT
